raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags some unverifiable claims, but does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.6": "The revised draft reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "The agent does not mark confidence for each recommendation, only mentions uncertainty in the 'Other recommendations' section.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No new errors or harmful content are introduced in the revised draft.",
    "RX.5": "Some changes are annotated with reasons, but not every non-cosmetic change is traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags some unverifiable claims, but does not thoroughly audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.6: The revised draft reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not mark confidence for each recommendation, only mentions uncertainty in the 'Other recommendations' section.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced in the revised draft.
rationale.RX.5: Some changes are annotated with reasons, but not every non-cosmetic change is traced.
